Library.title: Library
Library.emptyDescription: Create your first markdown page above, or drop one in your /Library folder. Your agents can read and search anything you put here.
Library.translateHint: Need to translate? Just ask any agent in DM: "Translate this document to Korean".

Welcome.title: Welcome to BossBoard
Welcome.subtitle: Your local-first AI workspace. Files stay on your machine, agents do real work, and you bring your own AI keys.
Welcome.skipExplore: Skip — I'll explore on my own

DeviceLimit.title: Device limit reached
DeviceLimit.orSignOutHint: Or sign out from another device above to continue here.
DeviceLimit.whyBody: Each install of BossBoard registers as a separate device — including reinstalls and PC formatting. If you reformatted, simply sign out from the old device above and the slot frees up immediately.

Errors.keyInvalid: {provider} API key invalid. Check Settings → AI providers.
Errors.contextTooLong: Context too long for {provider}. Compress the conversation or use a model with a larger context window.
